fields.title: The Shawshank Redemption
fields.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

fields.title: The Dark Knight
fields.description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham into chaos.

fields.title: Inception
fields.description: A skilled thief leads a team into dreams to plant an idea into a target's subconscious.

fields.title: Interstellar
fields.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

fields.title: Parasite
fields.description: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household.

fields.title: Gladiator
fields.description: A former Roman general seeks revenge against a corrupt emperor.

fields.title: The Matrix
fields.description: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality.
